config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because once the collective is given priority too easily, it can justify abuse, censorship, and unfair treatment of minorities. A good society protects both public order and personal freedom, and it should only limit individual rights in narrow cases where there is a clear, serious harm to others. From my perspective, the safest path is to make society stronger by respecting the individual, not by sacrificing the individual first.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu justru menjadi pelindung utama agar mayoritas tidak dengan mudah menekan minoritas, dan sejarah di sini menunjukkan bahwa alasan “demi masyarakat” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Tentu ada situasi darurat di mana hak bisa dibatasi, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan dijadikan prinsip umum. Masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang paling mudah mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu menjaga ketertiban tanpa menginjak kebebasan dasar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement, because in my view society is strongest when it protects individual rights first rather than treating them as expendable. From an Indonesian perspective, I am wary of any broad claim that “the public good” should come before personal rights, because that kind of language can easily be used to silence dissent, pressure minorities, or excuse abuse by authorities. Of course, rights are not absolute in every situation, but limits should be narrow, necessary, and accountable, not a default rule that puts the collective above the person. A healthy society is not built by sacrificing the individual too quickly, but by making sure the common good and personal freedom are balanced carefully.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu; kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami cukup jelas bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” tanpa batas yang tegas, hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, sensor, dan penindasan terhadap kelompok kecil. Argumen bahwa masyarakat kuat harus didahulukan terdengar bagus di atas kertas, tetapi dalam praktiknya justru hak individu yang memberi rem agar “kepentingan umum” tidak berubah menjadi dalih sewenang-wenang. Saya setuju ada keadaan darurat yang sah untuk membatasi hak, tetapi itu harus sempit, terukur, dan bisa diuji, bukan dijadikan prinsip umum.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the idea that society should generally come before the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “for the common good” can become a convenient excuse for pressure, conformity, and abuse of power. The point raised about public order matters, but order is not a moral blank check; if rights are treated as secondary by default, minorities and dissenters are the first to pay the price. I do accept that some limits are necessary in emergencies or when one person clearly harms others, but those limits must be narrow and accountable, not a standing principle that the collective always wins. For me, a society is legitimate only when it protects people precisely because they are individuals, not because they are useful to the majority.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu, karena menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi batas utama bagi kepentingan masyarakat, bukan sebaliknya. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya cenderung curiga ketika “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai sebagai alasan umum, karena dalam praktiknya itu sering berubah menjadi pembenaran bagi penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, sensor, atau penindasan minoritas. Poin tentang ketertiban memang penting, tetapi ketertiban bukan alasan moral yang cukup untuk mengorbankan kebebasan dasar secara default. Saya menerima pembatasan hak hanya dalam keadaan yang benar-benar sempit, jelas, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
